interfaces.name: searchAuctionLots
interfaces.description: Search livestock auction lots across all categories with filters and sorting, used for homepage search, auctions page, 'search all auctions', and 'upcoming live auctions' views.

parameters.name: keyword
parameters.description: Free-text search term, e.g., 'angus heifer', 'feeder steers'.

parameters.name: categoryId
parameters.description: Optional livestock category filter, e.g., 'feeder_cattle', 'bulls'.

parameters.name: locationState
parameters.description: State filter, e.g., 'Oklahoma', 'Texas'.

parameters.name: locationCity
parameters.description: City filter, e.g., 'Dodge City'.

parameters.name: locationZip
parameters.description: ZIP/postal code for radius search, e.g., '78701'.

parameters.name: radiusMiles
parameters.description: Radius in miles around the ZIP code, e.g., 100.

parameters.name: headCountMin
parameters.description: Minimum head count filter, e.g., 10.

parameters.name: headCountMax
parameters.description: Maximum head count filter.

parameters.name: weightMinLbs
parameters.description: Minimum individual weight in pounds, e.g., 600.

parameters.name: weightMaxLbs
parameters.description: Maximum individual weight in pounds, e.g., 800.

parameters.name: priceUnit
parameters.description: Price basis the priceMin/priceMax apply to.

parameters.name: priceMin
parameters.description: Minimum price filter per the selected price_unit.

parameters.name: priceMax
parameters.description: Maximum price filter per the selected price_unit.

parameters.name: closingDateFilterType
parameters.description: How to constrain closing dates for the search.

parameters.name: closingDateDaysFromNowMin
parameters.description: Minimum days from now for closing date (e.g., 0 for today, 14 for two weeks out).

parameters.name: closingDateDaysFromNowMax
parameters.description: Maximum days from now for closing date (e.g., 3 for 'ending in the next 3 days', 21 for 'within 21 days').

parameters.name: auctionFormat
parameters.description: Filter by auction format, used for 'upcoming live auctions' views.

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Auction lifecycle status filter; buyer-facing searches typically use 'scheduled' and 'live'.

parameters.name: sortOption
parameters.description: Sorting to apply to search results.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Page number for paginated search results (1-based).

parameters.name: pageSize
parameters.description: Number of lots per page.

closing_datetime.description: ISO 8601 datetime string for auction closing.

is_watchlisted.description: True if this lot is currently on the user's watchlist.

interfaces.name: getAuctionFilterOptions
interfaces.description: Return filter option metadata for the auctions/search results page, including categories, location options, price units, and closing date presets.

interfaces.name: getAuctionSortOptions
interfaces.description: Return available sort options for auctions/search results and their user-friendly labels.

interfaces.name: getAuctionCategories
interfaces.description: Return all livestock auction categories for navigation menus and category-based browsing.

interfaces.name: getLotDetails
interfaces.description: Load full details for a specific auction lot, including seller info and whether it is on the user's watchlist.

parameters.name: lotId
parameters.description: ID of the auction lot to load.

is_own_listing.description: True if this lot belongs to the current user.

is_watchlisted.description: True if the current user has this lot on their watchlist.

user_max_bid_amount.description: The user's current maximum bid amount for this lot, if any.

user_is_high_bidder.description: True if the user's bid is currently leading.

interfaces.name: addLotToWatchlist
interfaces.description: Add a specific auction lot to the user's watchlist, creating the watchlist state if needed.

parameters.name: lotId
parameters.description: Auction lot to add to watchlist.

added_at.description: ISO 8601 datetime when the lot was added.

interfaces.name: removeLotFromWatchlist
interfaces.description: Remove a specific auction lot from the user's watchlist.

parameters.name: lotId
parameters.description: Auction lot to remove from watchlist.

interfaces.name: getWatchlistItems
interfaces.description: Return all auction lots currently on the user's watchlist, with sorting and basic filtering.

parameters.name: sortOption
parameters.description: Sort watchlist items, e.g., by closing time or price.

parameters.name: categoryId
parameters.description: Optional category filter for watchlist items.

parameters.name: priceMax
parameters.description: Optional maximum current price filter per lot's price_unit.

parameters.name: closingDateFilterType
parameters.description: Optional closing date filter type.

interfaces.name: placeMaximumBidOnLot
interfaces.description: Place or update the user's maximum bid on a specific auction lot. The bid amount is interpreted using the lot's price_unit (per_head, per_pound, or per_pair).

parameters.name: lotId
parameters.description: Auction lot to bid on.

parameters.name: amount
parameters.description: User's maximum bid amount per the lot's price_unit, e.g., 2.05 for 2.05 per pound.

interfaces.name: signIn
interfaces.description: Authenticate the user as buyer or seller and load their profile settings into internal session state.

parameters.name: email
parameters.description: User's registered email address.

parameters.name: password
parameters.description: User's password.

interfaces.name: registerBuyerAccount
interfaces.description: Create a new buyer account with profile information, livestock interests, and preferred contact settings, then sign the user in.

parameters.name: fullName
parameters.description: User's full name, e.g., 'Jordan Cattlebuyer'.

parameters.name: ranchName
parameters.description: Ranch or business name, e.g., 'Circle J Ranch'.

parameters.name: email
parameters.description: Registration email address.

parameters.name: password
parameters.description: Account password.

parameters.name: locationState
parameters.description: State where the user is based, e.g., 'Nebraska'.

parameters.name: locationCity
parameters.description: City where the user is based, e.g., 'Broken Bow'.

parameters.name: primaryLivestockInterests
parameters.description: Initial livestock interest selections to create for this buyer.

parameters.name: preferredContactMethod
parameters.description: User's preferred contact method for auction-related communication.

interfaces.name: getProfileSettings
interfaces.description: Load the current user's profile settings and selected livestock interests for display on the Profile Settings page.

items.description: Interest type selected for this profile, e.g., 'feeder_cattle'.

interfaces.name: updateProfileSettings
interfaces.description: Update the current user's profile details, livestock interests, preferred contact method, and visibility of buying interests.

parameters.name: profile
parameters.description: Subset of profile fields to update; unspecified fields remain unchanged.

parameters.name: livestockInterests
parameters.description: If provided, replaces the current set of selected livestock interests.

interfaces.name: getLivestockInterestOptions
interfaces.description: Return the available livestock interest types and their labels for use as checkboxes on the Profile Settings and registration forms.

interfaces.name: getCreateListingFormOptions
interfaces.description: Provide options and defaults needed to render the Create Listing form, such as categories, states, and price unit choices.

defaultAuctionFormat.description: Default format for new listings, typically 'online_timed'.

defaultClosingTimeLocal.description: Default closing time in local time, e.g., '17:00' for 5:00 PM.

interfaces.name: createAuctionListing
interfaces.description: Create and publish a new auction listing for the signed-in seller based on the Create Listing form.

parameters.name: title
parameters.description: Listing title, e.g., '15 Hereford bred cows - Kansas'.

parameters.name: categoryId
parameters.description: Category for this listing, e.g., 'bred_cows'.

parameters.name: breed
parameters.description: Primary breed, e.g., 'Hereford'.

parameters.name: headCount
parameters.description: Quantity of head in the lot, e.g., 15.

parameters.name: locationState
parameters.description: State where the lot is located, e.g., 'Kansas'.

parameters.name: locationCity
parameters.description: City where the lot is located, e.g., 'Dodge City'.

parameters.name: auctionFormat
parameters.description: Auction format for this listing. Defaults to 'online_timed' if omitted.

parameters.name: priceUnit
parameters.description: Price basis, e.g., 'per_head'.

parameters.name: startingBidAmount
parameters.description: Starting bid amount in USD per the selected price_unit, e.g., 1200.

parameters.name: reservePriceAmount
parameters.description: Optional reserve price per the selected price_unit, e.g., 1400.

parameters.name: closingDate
parameters.description: Closing calendar date in 'YYYY-MM-DD' format.

parameters.name: closingTime
parameters.description: Closing time in 'HH:MM' 24-hour local time, e.g., '17:00' for 5:00 PM.

parameters.name: description
parameters.description: Full text description, including age, breeding status, and management notes.

status.description: Initial status, e.g., 'scheduled' for a published future auction.

interfaces.name: getMyListings
interfaces.description: Return the current user's auction listings for the My Listings page, filterable by status.

parameters.name: statusFilter
parameters.description: Filter listings by status, e.g., 'draft' to show only draft listings.

parameters.name: sortOption
parameters.description: Sort order for the listings table.

bid_count.description: Number of bids received on this lot.

interfaces.name: getListingForEdit
interfaces.description: Load an existing listing owned by the current user into an editable form, including which fields are currently editable.

parameters.name: lotId
parameters.description: Listing to edit.

interfaces.name: updateAuctionListing
interfaces.description: Apply updates to an existing listing owned by the current user. Supports editing draft listings and limited updates to active listings.

parameters.name: lotId
parameters.description: Listing to update.

parameters.name: updates
parameters.description: Fields to update; unspecified fields remain unchanged.

closing_date.description: Optional new closing date in 'YYYY-MM-DD' format.

closing_time.description: Optional new closing time in 'HH:MM' 24-hour local time.

interfaces.name: getSavedSearches
interfaces.description: List all saved searches for the current user with criteria summaries and alert status, for the Saved Searches page and homepage shortcuts.

criteria_summary.description: Human-readable summary of the main filters.

interfaces.name: createSavedSearch
interfaces.description: Create a new saved search from the current search criteria, with optional in-site alerts.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Custom label for the saved search, e.g., 'TX bred heifers under 2k'.

parameters.name: keyword
parameters.description: Keyword terms for the search, e.g., 'bred heifers'.

parameters.name: categoryId
parameters.description: Optional category filter.

parameters.name: priceMax
parameters.description: Maximum allowed price per the selected priceUnit.

parameters.name: alertsEnabled
parameters.description: Whether to enable in-site alerts for this saved search.

interfaces.name: renameSavedSearch
interfaces.description: Rename an existing saved search.

parameters.name: savedSearchId
parameters.description: Saved search to rename.

parameters.name: newName
parameters.description: New name for the saved search.

interfaces.name: updateSavedSearchAlerts
interfaces.description: Toggle in-site alerts on or off for a saved search.

parameters.name: savedSearchId
parameters.description: Saved search whose alert setting should be updated.

parameters.name: alertsEnabled
parameters.description: New alert state for this saved search.

interfaces.name: deleteSavedSearch
interfaces.description: Delete a saved search for the current user.

parameters.name: savedSearchId
parameters.description: Saved search to delete.

interfaces.name: runSavedSearch
interfaces.description: Re-run a saved search and return its current matching lots, used when a user clicks a saved search.

parameters.name: savedSearchId
parameters.description: Saved search to run.

interfaces.name: getMessageThreads
interfaces.description: Display the user's message conversations list for the Messages page, with unread counts and last message previews.

parameters.name: unreadOnly
parameters.description: If true, return only threads with unread messages.

interfaces.name: getMessageThreadDetails
interfaces.description: Load a specific message thread and its full message history for reading and replying.

parameters.name: threadId
parameters.description: Message thread to open.

interfaces.name: sendMessageToSeller
interfaces.description: Start a new message thread with the seller of a given auction lot from the lot details page.

parameters.name: lotId
parameters.description: Auction lot the message is about.

parameters.name: body
parameters.description: Message text to send to the seller.

interfaces.name: sendMessageReply
interfaces.description: Send a reply within an existing message thread.

parameters.name: threadId
parameters.description: Thread to reply to.

parameters.name: body
parameters.description: Reply message text.

interfaces.name: getAboutPageContent
interfaces.description: Return structured content for the About page, describing the platform's purpose and advantages.

interfaces.name: getHelpPageContent
interfaces.description: Return step-by-step guidance, FAQs, and troubleshooting content for the Help & How It Works page.

interfaces.name: getContactSupportInfo
interfaces.description: Provide contact details for the Contact page, including email, phone, and support hours.

interfaces.name: submitContactSupportRequest
interfaces.description: Submit a contact form request to customer support for questions about auctions, listings, or account issues.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Name of the user submitting the request.

parameters.name: email
parameters.description: Contact email to receive responses.

parameters.name: topic
parameters.description: High-level topic for routing.

parameters.name: subject
parameters.description: Short subject line for the request.

parameters.name: message
parameters.description: Full description of the question or issue.

ticketId.description: Reference ID for the support ticket, if created.

interfaces.name: getTermsOfUseContent
interfaces.description: Load the Terms of Use content for display, including sections and last-updated date.

interfaces.name: getPrivacyPolicyContent
interfaces.description: Load the Privacy Policy content for display, including how user data is collected and used.

helperFunctions.name: _getCurrentProfileSettings
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to load or initialize the single user's ProfileSettings record from storage and keep it in memory for the session.

helperFunctions.name: _buildLotSummaryFromAuctionLot
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to transform an AuctionLot storage record into a UI-friendly lot summary object with category_name and is_watchlisted flags.

helperFunctions.name: _applySavedSearchCriteriaToQuery
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper that maps a SavedSearch record to the parameter set expected by searchAuctionLots.

helperFunctions.name: _getOrCreateWatchlistStorage
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to load the user's watchlist_items from storage or create an empty collection if none exist.
